---
title: "Discrete with extinction"
author: "Caleb"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

## Load trees


```{r}

library(treats)
bd_params <- make.bd.params(speciation = 0.1, extinction = 0.07)

stop_rule <- list(max.living = 30)
set.seed(123)

mass_extinction <- make.events(
                      target       = "taxa",
                      condition    = taxa.condition(29),
                      modification = random.extinction(0.75))

trees <- treats(stop.rule = stop_rule, bd.params = bd_params, null.error = 100, replicates = 10, events = mass_extinction)
trees <- lapply(trees, drop.singles)

fix.zero.branches <- function(tree, min_length = 1e-8) {
  tree$edge.length[tree$edge.length <= 0] <- min_length
  return(tree)
}

trees <- lapply(trees, fix.zero.branches)

write.tree(trees, "../Data/trees/randomextinction.tre")
trees <- read.tree("../Data/trees/randomextinction.tre")

# trees <- read.tree("../Data/trees/simulated.tre")


slow_binary_transitions <- matrix(c(
    0.99, 0.01,
    0.01, 0.99
), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE)

slow_multi_transitions <- matrix(c(
    0.99, 0.025, 0.025,
    0.025, 0.99, 0.025,
    0.025, 0.025, 0.99
), nrow = 3, byrow = TRUE)

slow_binary <- treats::make.traits(process = discrete.process, n = 85, process.args = list(transitions = slow_binary_transitions))
slow_multi <- treats::make.traits(process = discrete.process, n = 15, process.args = list(transitions = slow_multi_transitions))


med_binary_transitions <- matrix(c(
  0.90, 0.1,
  0.1, 0.9
), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE)


med_multi_transitions <- matrix(c(
  0.9, 0.05, 0.05,
  0.05, 0.9, 0.05,
  0.05, 0.05, 0.9
), nrow = 3, byrow = TRUE)

med_binary <- treats::make.traits(process = discrete.process, n = 85, process.args = list(transitions = med_binary_transitions))
med_multi <- treats::make.traits(process = discrete.process, n = 15, process.args = list(transitions = med_multi_transitions))

fast_binary_transitions <- matrix(c(
    0.1, 0.9,
    0.9, 0.1
), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE)

fast_multi_transitions <- matrix(c(
    0.1, 0.45, 0.45, 
    0.45, 0.1, 0.45,
    0.45, 0.45, 0.1 
), nrow = 3, byrow = TRUE)

fast_binary <- treats::make.traits(process = discrete.process, n = 85, process.args = list(transitions = fast_binary_transitions))
fast_multi <- treats::make.traits(process = discrete.process, n = 15, process.args = list(transitions = fast_multi_transitions))

traits <- list(fast = fast_binary, med = med_binary, slow = slow_binary)



## map the traits



slow_matrices <- lapply(trees, function(tree) {
    mapped_binary <- (map.traits(slow_binary, tree))$data
    mapped_multi <- (map.traits(slow_multi, tree))$data
    matrix <- cbind(mapped_binary, mapped_multi)
    return(matrix)
})

med_matrices <- lapply(trees, function(tree) {
    mapped_binary <- (map.traits(med_binary, tree))$data
    mapped_multi <- (map.traits(med_multi, tree))$data
    matrix <- cbind(mapped_binary, mapped_multi)
    return(matrix)
})

fast_matrices <- lapply(trees, function(tree) {
    mapped_binary <- (map.traits(fast_binary, tree))$data
    mapped_multi <- (map.traits(fast_multi, tree))$data
    matrix <- cbind(mapped_binary, mapped_multi)
    return(matrix)
})


discrete_matrices <- list(slow = slow_matrices, med = med_matrices, fast = fast_matrices)
saveRDS(discrete_matrices, "../Data/matrices/randomExtinction/discretematrices.rds")

discrete_matrices <- readRDS("../Data/matrices/randomExtinction/discretematrices.rds")


```





## Different tree coverages

```{r}

## fossil degredation as well

source("../Functions/fossil.pres.R")

living <- lapply(discrete_matrices, remove.fossil, trees = trees, type = "discrete")
fossilised_high <- lapply(discrete_matrices, fossil.pres, trees = trees, preservation = 0.5, type = "discrete")
all_fossil <- lapply(discrete_matrices, fossil.pres, trees = trees, preservation = 1.0, type = "discrete")
fossilised_med <- lapply(discrete_matrices, fossil.pres, trees = trees, preservation = 0.15, type = "discrete")
fossilised_low <- lapply(discrete_matrices, fossil.pres, trees = trees, preservation = 0.05, type = "discrete")



# plot(fossilised_low$slow[[13]]$tree)

fossil_matrices <- lapply(names(discrete_matrices), function(level) {
  lapply(seq_along(discrete_matrices[[level]]), function(i) {
    list(
      all = all_fossil[[level]][[i]],
      fossil_high = fossilised_high[[level]][[i]],
      fossil_med = fossilised_med[[level]][[i]],
      fossil_low = fossilised_low[[level]][[i]],
      living = living[[level]][[i]]
    )
  })
})

# Assign names to the outer list
names(fossil_matrices) <- names(discrete_matrices)

saveRDS(fossil_matrices, "../Data/matrices/randomExtinction/fossilmatrices.Rds")



```


## ACE
```{r}

n_cores  <- 11
anc.states <- function(fossil_matrices) {
  lapply(fossil_matrices, function(level) {
    lapply(level, function(x) {
  # Run multi.ace for each tree
  anc_states <- multi.ace(data = x$matrix, 
                          tree = x$tree, 
                          models = "SYM", 
                          output = "combined.matrix",
                          verbose = TRUE)
  return(anc_states)})})
}


fossil_anc <- lapply(fossil_matrices, anc.states)



```


## selective extinction
```{r}



library(treats)
bd_params <- make.bd.params(speciation = 0.1, extinction = 0.07)

stop_rule <- list(max.living = 30)
set.seed(123)
## so can simulate say 40 characters that are correlated by extinction -> in this way. then on resulting tree, simulate non selective traits with map.traits. can decide what level of traits need to be selected by extinction.
selective_extinction <- make.events(
                      target       = "taxa",
                      condition    = taxa.condition(29),
                      modification = trait.extinction(x = 1,
                                                      condition = `<`))

selective <- treats(traits = med_binary, stop.rule = stop_rule, bd.params = bd_params, null.error = 100, replicates = 10, events = selective_extinction)
trees <- lapply(trees, drop.singles)

```
